p0_gaps: Codex Repair / Controlled Hands production-safe drill

recommended_first_v2_block.name: V2 P0 First Run + Recovery Command Center
recommended_first_v2_block.why: Highest product leverage: makes the accepted V1 understandable in 10 seconds, ties Mina Scheme, HUD, Diagnost, Recovery, Cost/Privacy status and Demo Mode into one safe guided entry.
scope: visual alignment with mockups without new raster character generation
risks: UX regression if too much information is shown
visual polish must stay aligned with mockups
acceptance_criteria: first screen explains status/next action in 10 seconds
Safe Mode/Recovery/Codex Repair route visible but not scary
no technical terms in normal mode

owner_assisted_postponed: real phone APK/PWA until production V2 final

blocks.target: 11/10 guided first launch: user understands system, setup route, safe launch, demo path, no mentor needed.
blocks.gap: No full production first-run wizard tied to installer/tray and owner-assisted readiness; setup route exists but not a complete product onboarding track.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Build V2 First Run Command Center: guided setup, demo mode, readiness route, recovery-first copy.

blocks.target: 11/10 visual system map aligned with mockups, real status sources, premium silhouette, mobile bottom sheet.
blocks.gap: Current Scheme passes, but bespoke Mina art and deeper real-state bindings remain V2 polish.
blocks.recommended_next_action: V2 visual polish pack after P0 onboarding/recovery.

blocks.target: 11/10 always-useful live status rail with next action, notifications, system date/time, owner-readable state.
blocks.gap: Needs deeper source-of-truth binding and quick actions per module.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Bind HUD cards to V2 source-of-truth snapshot during onboarding block.

blocks.target: 11/10 end-to-end task lifecycle with artifacts/evidence/verifier/memory/next action, durable persistence, live Local Agent path.
blocks.gap: Strong UI/runtime chain; needs production persistence/load tests and real Local Agent bridge acceptance.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Add to QA Autotest Factory after P0 onboarding.

blocks.target: 11/10 council profiles, source quality gates, prompt packages, contradiction map, decision passport as enforced workflow.
blocks.gap: Workflow exists; needs stricter enforcement, more source-card states, and real provider readiness UX polish.
blocks.recommended_next_action: ResearchOps polish block after P0.

blocks.target: 11/10 every important decision has reasons, alternatives, risks, evidence refs, first thing to check.
blocks.gap: Good for tested scenarios; must become mandatory gate for acceptance workflows.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Enforce in QA Autotest Factory and Verifier rules.

blocks.target: 11/10 non-decorative verifier with automated checks, evidence quality, PASS_WITH_RISKS, fix request, no false PASS.
blocks.gap: Verifier exists and catches bad reports; needs automated test runner integration and repeatable acceptance specs.
blocks.recommended_next_action: QA Autotest Factory foundation.

blocks.target: 11/10 fast relevant search over tasks/artifacts/evidence/decisions/files with scalable index and no confident garbage.
blocks.gap: Relevance fixed; large dataset/scalable FTS and real storage indexing remain to prove.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Design Memory Index V2 after P0 onboarding/recovery path.

blocks.target: 11/10 system explains problem, severity, safe next action, recovery wizard, repair via Codex, rollback evidence.
blocks.gap: Recovery works in sandbox/evidence; production-grade guided recovery still needs tighter UI path and incident-to-repair flow.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Include recovery entry in V2 First Run/Recovery command center.

blocks.target: 11/10 repair workspace, diagnostic pack, diff review, verifier, guardian risk, rollback, controlled apply.
blocks.gap: Sandbox proof strong; production active-project apply remains intentionally gated and owner-assisted.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Build safe UI drill and QA tests; keep production apply owner-assisted.

blocks.target: 11/10 Guardian/Approval/Cost/Privacy/Emergency Stop block risky actions without fear or ambiguity.
blocks.gap: Strong; needs formal policy matrix surfaced consistently across product shell/tray.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Carry into First Run and Windows Companion UX.

blocks.target: 11/10 owner always knows financial risk; unknown billing is warning, paid services require approval.
evidence: Cost Guard UI/status in previous gates
blocks.gap: UI logic exists; actual dashboards require owner-assisted verification at final.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Add owner-assisted checklist and visible unknown-state flow.

blocks.target: 11/10 secrets never leave context packs/evidence/memory; clear block message and safe redaction path.
blocks.gap: Good in tested paths; needs broader fixture suite across all outbound packages.
blocks.recommended_next_action: QA Autotest Factory negative security fixtures.

blocks.target: 11/10 sub-second common navigation, no jank, measured budgets and regression guard.
blocks.gap: Workspace slightly over target; no broad refactor made during final gate.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Add performance budgets to QA Autotest Factory; optimize after measured hotspots.

blocks.target: 11/10 mobile layout usable, installable PWA/APK, no overflow, owner can control remotely.
blocks.gap: Viewport/BlueStacks usable; real phone postponed until production V2 final.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Keep emulator/PWA-web checks until final owner-assisted phone pass.

blocks.target: 11/10 production wrapper with signing, install flow, deep links/PWA behavior, real phone acceptance.
blocks.gap: Debug/emulator readiness only; production signing and real phone are red-zone/owner-assisted.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Do not request raw phone install now; prepare production signing checklist later.

blocks.target: 11/10 installer, tray, autostart without visible windows, safe restart, logs, Local Agent status.
blocks.gap: Good foundations; installer/tray shell not product-final yet.
blocks.recommended_next_action: V2 Product Shell block after P0 first-run/recovery.

blocks.target: 11/10 automated Playwright/API/backend checks linked to evidence, Verifier, and Codex Repair.
blocks.gap: Strong one-off smoke, but not a reusable test factory yet.
blocks.recommended_next_action: First P1 block if P0 onboarding/recovery accepted.

blocks.target: 11/10 quick start, demo mode, owner-readable docs, short help inside product.
blocks.gap: Docs exist; in-product help/demo mode not final.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Combine with First Run Command Center.

blocks.target: 11/10 evidence index, health metrics, incidents, performance traces, source-of-truth dashboard.
blocks.gap: Evidence strong; live observability dashboard and metrics registry need consolidation.
blocks.recommended_next_action: Add to QA/Observability after first V2 block.
